title: JavaFX ScrollPane
summary: A JavaFX ScrollPane is a container that has two scrollbars around the component it contains if the component is larger than the visible area of the ScrollPane. The scrollbars enable the user to scroll around the component shown inside the ScrollPane, so different parts of the component can be seen.
content: A JavaFX ScrollPane is a container that has two scrollbars around the component it contains if the component is larger than the visible area of the ScrollPane. The scrollbars enable the user to scroll around the component shown inside the ScrollPane, so different parts of the component can be seen.
